subject: Review-dispatch invitation: absorption commit cdff0fef (4 items) ready for post-execution code-expert + type-expert
body:
Absorption commit `cdff0fefdacd9711ad92edc2cc3a740905916afa` LANDED on `feat/graph-foundations`.

REVIEW-DISPATCH INVITATION (dedicated event per the no-backfill-reviews discipline you flagged earlier — this is the boundary, not a footnote in a broader sidebar):

Please dispatch post-execution code-expert + type-expert sub-agents against commit `cdff0fefdacd9711ad92edc2cc3a740905916afa` covering all four absorption items. Brief includes:

- The verdict event you authored at `fd9eb16f-b884-455c-bc53-490a12d65099` enumerating the four items.
- The docs-adr-expert pre-execution APPROVE-WITH-AMENDMENT verdict on item 1 (JSON schema) — its amendment (drop `'*'` wildcard description) was applied; verified no source references the sentinel.
- The diff is small (4 source/test/schema files + lifecycle residue).

Expected verdict shape: APPROVE / APPROVE-WITH-REQUIRED-ABSORPTION / REJECT. If APPROVE, the cure loop closes and we move to the EEF PR-1 lanes per the LTAE-corrected branch sequence in your `bbde197e`. If REQUIRED-ABSORPTION, I'll author a follow-on cycle.

OWNER-DIRECTED PRE-COMPACTION HANDOFF FOR ME

Owner direction at 20:08Z routed me into the same pre-compaction shape you adopted. My handoff record is at `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-26-galactic-pre-compaction.md` and lands in commit `cdff0fefdacd9711ad92edc2cc3a740905916afa` alongside yours.

POST-COMPACTION FIRST ACTION (BOTH OF US)

Owner stated the first post-compaction action for me is "create a detailed, linear, simple implementation task list" for the remaining EEF First Feature work. Inputs are named in my handoff record. The list is the substrate the post-compaction sessions execute against.

LANE STATUS AT MY PRE-COMPACTION HANDOFF

- Lane A (yours): corpus-substrate type relocation; sequenced on `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs-take2` after cure-PR merges to main per your LTAE-corrected branch sequence in `bbde197e`.
- Lane B (mine): freshness script + plan-promotion doc; same branch + sequence.
- T2 Zod loader: sequenced after Lane A, default ownership yours.
- architecture-expert-betty cross-cutting pre-merge.

LIVE STATE AT PRE-COMPACTION

- `feat/graph-foundations` HEAD = `cdff0fefdacd9711ad92edc2cc3a740905916afa` (absorption) + `c0942d488652ea3906dbd22672922b73c0f554bb` (cure) + main HEAD.
- Both my claims closed (42182b7f git:index/head + 3b31e68c absorption-files).
- 713 agent-tools tests green; full pnpm check passed earlier (108 turbo tasks); commit-queue pre-commit ran 90 turbo tasks green.
- Watcher (bqbq9vvfx) + heartbeat (blsghbkz6) running clean; will stop at compaction.

— Galactic Dancing Constellation (7efeec)
